title: ThermoPro TP511 Digital Candy Thermometer with Pot Clip, Programmable Instant Read Food Meat Thermometer with 20cm Long Probe for Candy Sugar Jam Milk Smoker Baking Grilling Candle Liquid Oil
features: Preset and alarm function: Never overcook again with this programmable oil thermometer that alerts you upon reaching your preset cooking temperature with its flashing backlight

Advanced 20cm probe with pan clip: Get precise measurements with high-tech 20cm probe that features an accuracy of ± 0.5℃. Pan Clip fastens securely to cookers, meaning you less likely to be splattered with hot oil when using this probe thermometer

90° adjustable anti-vapour backlit display: Deep fry thermometer features an oversized anti-vapour LCD display, a touch-activated backlight and an adjustable head that allows users to read temperatures from different angles in low-light conditions
IPX5 waterproof thermometer: Clean under running water without worry with this IPX5-rated waterproof digital food thermometer; Batteries included

Calibration function and lasts a lifetime: The calibration function ensures long-lasting accuracy, Not only can this kitchen thermometer be used in candy making, but also for creating fried food, sauces, jams, liquids, meats and more

Certified by NSF: All ThermoPro products have been certified by NSF. This ensures that our products are food-safe, quality qualified and environmental friendly, which is more secure than most products on the market
description: Product Description Cut out all the guesswork of cooking by getting the ideal food temperature in an instant! Package contents: 1 x Programmable Instant-Read Food Thermometer 1 x AAA Battery 1 x Cooking Mount 1 x Manual ThermoPro TP511 Frying Thermometer with Clip Incorporate the TP511 as a great kitchen assistant for your home that not only reliably provides precise temperature monitoring, but also gives an ultra-fast reading response. Features an extra-long 20cm step-down probe and backlit LCD display that shows quick and accurate readings of temperatures between -50°C and 300°C. Simple to use, cuts down on cooking time, and ideal for beginner cooks! Use the TP511 as your go-to choice when you need a thermometer for candy, jam, chocolate, cheese making. Response Time: 4-8seconds Probe Length: 20cm Temperature Range: -58°F~572°F (-50°C~300°C) Temperature Accuracy: ±0.9°F(±0.5°C) from 32 to 212°F (0 to 100°C) Temperature Units: °C or °F Auto Shut-Off Time: 10 minutes of inactivity Backlight: Touch Sensitive Uses: Pot thermometer for making candy, fried food, liquids, meat and more. Programmable Alarm Function After setting your target temperature, the backlight will turn red to alert you when the target temperature is reached. Avoid overcooking, and start enjoying perfectly cooked food. Accurate Temperature Monitoring This quick-read thermometer measures temperatures with an accuracy of ±0.9°F, providing you the exact measurements you need for efficient cooking . 90° Adjustable Head 90° adjustable head allows you to rotate the head of bread thermometer to find the most comfortable angle for your temperature viewing . Waterproof Thermometer IPX5-rated waterproof thermometer protects this air fryer thermometer from splashes and accidental spills. Easily clean up after measuring temperatures for cooked sugars, liquids, foods, coffee, milk and more. Large Anti-Vapour Backlit Display Touch-activated backlit button provide an easy viewing experience when cooking outside at night or in a low-light situation , making this water thermometer a delight to use. Calibration Function Optimize the temperature-measuring process of this candle thermometer through an easy-to-use, adjustable calibration that can prolong its lifetime value .
